violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the prep area of the kitchen was blocked by dishes and utensils in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Equipment was removed from the sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Various deli meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date marks were added to food items during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the food preparation area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The wall behind a food prep table/station in the bakery prep area is covered with material that is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (wood). New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
